title: AiPlatformConfiguration
description: This schema defines the JWT Configuration.

keepAliveTime.description: Keep alive time for the gRPC server

keepAliveTimeout.description: Keep alive timeout for the gRPC server

contextMemoryConfiguration.description: Tuning for the Context Memory T0 (user preferences) block shipped to the AI Platform via the gRPC user_memory_context field.

tokenBudget.description: Maximum number of tokens worth of T0 user-preference memories to include. Memories are ranked by freshness + usage and filled in order until the budget or item cap is reached.

maxItems.description: Maximum number of T0 user-preference memories to include regardless of token budget.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the AI Platform is enabled

host.description: Host for the AI Platform server

port.description: Port for the AI Platform server

tlsCertPath.description: Path to the TLS certificate for the AI Platform server

tlsKeyPath.description: Path to the TLS key for the AI Platform server

trustedCertsPath.description: Path to the trusted CA certificate for the AI Platform server

grpc.description: gRPC configuration for the AI Platform server

contextMemory.description: Context Memory tuning for the T0 user-preference block assembled by Collate and shipped to the AI Platform.
